name: QA 1484
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1484

Workout for pcp-reboot-init - $PCP_LOG_DIR/NOTICES fixup part



Copyright (c) 2024 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py centos-stream9-container reproduce

Copyright (c) 2024 Ken McDonell. All Rights Reserved.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py centos-stream9-container reproduce
statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1484.out.bad)
4,5c4
< PCP_BINADM_DIR/pcp-reboot-init: Error: $PCP_LOG_DIR (TMP/log) does not exist
< ... ls output for TMP
---
> sudo: PCP_BINADM_DIR/pcp-reboot-init: command not found
8a8
> sudo: PCP_BINADM_DIR/pcp-reboot-init: command not found
12c12,13
< -rw-r--r-- pcp pcp TMP/log/NOTICES
---
> sudo: PCP_BINADM_DIR/pcp-reboot-init: command not found
> ls: cannot access TMP/log/NOTICES*: No such file or directory
15,18c16
< touch: cannot touch TMP/log/NOTICES: Permission denied
< PCP_BINADM_DIR/pcp-reboot-init: Error: touch $PCP_LOG_DIR/NOTICES (TMP/log/NOTICES) failed
< ls: cannot access TMP/log/NOTICES: No such file or directory
< drwxr-xr-x pcpqa pcpqa TMP/log
---
> sudo: command not 
22,23c20,21
< -rw-r--r-- pcp pcp TMP/log/NOTICES
< -rw-r--r-- root root TMP/log/NOTICES.old
---
> sudo: PCP_BINADM_DIR/pcp-reboot-init: command not found
> -rw-r--r-- root root TMP/log/NOTICES
26,27c24,26
< -rw-r--r-- pcp pcp TMP/log/NOTICES
< -rw-r--r-- pcpqa pcpqa TMP/log/NOTICES.old
---
> sudo: PCP_BINADM_DIR/pcp-reboot-init: command not found
> -rw-r--r-- pcpqa pcpqa TMP/log/NOTICES
> -rw-r--r-- root root TMP/log/NOTICES.old
30,34c29,30
< touch: cannot touch TMP/log/NOTICES: Permission denied
< PCP_BINADM_DIR/pcp-reboot-init: Error: mv & touch $PCP_LOG_DIR/NOTICES (TMP/log/NOTICES) failed
< drwxr-xr-x pcpqa pcpqa TMP/log
< -rw-r--r-- pcpqa pcpqa TMP/log/NOTICES.old
< -rw-r--r-- pcpqa pcpqa TMP/log/NOTICES.old
---
> sudo: command not 
> -rw-r--r-- pcpqa pcpqa TMP/log/NOTICES
37c33,34
< -rw-r--r-- pcp pcp TMP/log/NOTICES
---
> sudo: PCP_BINADM_DIR/pcp-reboot-init: command not found
> -rw-rw-rw- pcp pcp TMP/log/NOTICES
40,41c37,38
< -rw-r--r-- pcp pcp TMP/log/NOTICES
< lrwxrwxrwx root root TMP/log/NOTICES.old
---
> sudo: PCP_BINADM_DIR/pcp-reboot-init: command not found
> lrwxrwxrwx root root TMP/log/NOTICES
42a40
> chown: cannot dereference '/tmp/1484-1672693/log/NOTICES': No such file or directory
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
